news.headline: Amazon CEO Says Chip Business 'On Fire' As AWS Steps Up Challenge To Nvidia

Jassy's letter offers the clearest disclosure yet for how the tech giant's cloud business is benefiting from its artificial intelligence offerings.  The $15 billion run rate is "ascending rapidly," the Amazon leader wrote.
